name: The painters - Urbanspook
description:
NUH UH I DON'T SUPPORT URBANSPOOK.

SFW INTRO

Your life has begun to get a little... horrifying. Random objects showing up and, what you assume, paranoia crawling up your spine.

A sfw bot?! I know, insane. But genuinely, writing sfw opens up more writing for me. Sure, I prefer writing smut but it doesn't open up the chance for a story. Hope this is good enough.
creator: Ieatghostsforbreakfast
